package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_now_in_tight_loop: `time.Now()` called on every iteration of a tight inner loop
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario684Positive(items []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		_ = time.Now()
		_ = time.After(time.Millisecond)
		total += len(item)
	}
	return total
}
